programmes.show_description: Sraith a dhéanann ceiliúradh ar amhráin a bhíodh againn ag éirí aníos. (Series which celebrates and takes a fresh look at the songs of our schooldays.)
Gníomhaíonn buíon Sinaloa nuair nach bhfaigheann siad sásamh ó mhuintir Arellano. (After a disappointing conversation with the Arellanos, the Sinaloa cartel reacts.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Is i gCarna a bheidh Áine an tseachtain seo. (Áine Ní Bhreisléain is in Carna as she explores the west coast and the communities that work there.)
Buaicphointí CLG an deireadh seachtaine, cluichí ceannais shraitheanna Allianz san áireamh. (Highlights of the weekend's best GAA action including the Allianz League finals.)
Sraith ceoil thraidisiúnta nua ó fhéile Scoil Cheoil an Earraigh 2024 i gCorca Dhuibhne. (Pádraig Ó Sé brings us the best of music from Scoil Cheoil an Earraigh 2024.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá imní ar Bhréidín, níl dé ar Chlúmh agus níor inis sé do Bhréidín cá raibh sé ag dul. (Tweedy is worried, Fluff is gone and did not think to tell Tweedy where he was going.)
Níl a fhios ag na Singalings cé chomh fada is atá an abhainn ná cá gcríochnaíonn sí. (The Singalings wonder how long the river could be and where does it end?)
Bíonn spraoi ag na Dathanna ar fad ag dathú le chéile. (The Colours have fun colouring together.)
Tagann Harry Húdíní ar cuairt chuig an scoil agus bíonn Cory agus a chairde ar bís! (Harry Hoodini comes for a school visit, much to the delight of Cory and his friends!)
Tá éigeandáil ar loch reoite agus bíonn fadhb ag Heléna Héileacaptair leaindeáil. (There is an emergency at a frozen lake and Helena Helicopter has issues landing.)
Ag díol bréagán a bheidh Abby agus Rudy inniu. (Abby and Rudy are selling toys today.)
Bíonn Pip agus Posy ag súil le sneachta ach ní thagann sé. (Pip and Posy wake up disappointed when the snow they expected hasn't come.)
Tugann na hOlobobanna rud éigin uathu nuair a bhíonn siad ag tabhairt aire do shiopa Norbet. (The Olobobs give something away at Norbet's shop.)
Féachann Romeo le cumhachtaí Armadylan a úsáid chun feabhas a chur ar a shaotharlann. (Romeo tries to use Armadylan's powers to improve his lab.)
Téann Wussywat amach ag siúl ach cailleann sí a mapa agus a compás. (When Wussywat goes hiking she loses the map and the compass.)
Tá Zou le cúnamh a thabhairt do mháthair Elzee lena togra duaithníochta inniu. ( Zou helps Elzee's Mom with a camouflage project.)
Tagann Ricky ar chlogad VR agus tá sé ar bís. (Ricky is very excited when he comes across a VR helmet.)
Tugann Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex misneach do Shú-talúnasár óg atá ag iarraidh damhsa. (Ginger and the Pea-Rexes give a young Strawberrisaurus the courage to perform a dance.)
Ba mhaith le Dot cabhrú leis na madraí atá tréigthe chun baile buan a fháil. (Dot becomes inspired to help out the dogs at the local shelter that need forever homes.)
Tá Henry, Lisa agus Lottie ag fanacht thar oíche tigh Ella mar go mbeidh siad ag dul chuig an bhfeirm amárach. (Henry, Lisa and Lottie are staying overnight with Ella.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tá rún ag Charlie agus Lola sorcas a chur ar siúl dá seantuismitheoirí. (Charlie and Lola are planning to entertain their grandparents with a circus.)
Tá Pinocchio ag iarraidh greim a fháil ar iasc draíochta. (Pinocchio wants to catch a magic fish!)
Níor éirigh go maith le Lola sa scrúdú céimseata agus tá faitíos uirthi é a insint dá máthair. (Lola is afraid to tell her mother that she got a bad grade in her geometry test.)
Tá Angelo ag dul ar thuras fada bóthair agus tá sé ag iarraidh spraoi a bheith aige. (Angelo wants to have fun during a long car trip.)
Déanann Dónall Dána a dhícheall áit a fháil sa scoil. (Dónall tries his best to get into school.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi dhul ag siúl sa gcoill. (A fun song about walking in the forest.)
Tagann na huimhreacha cearnacha le chéile. (Some of the square numbers gather together as a club.)
Cabhróidh an Traein Eagraithe leis na Dathanna gach rud a eagrú. (Today, the Sorting Express Train helps the Colours get sorted.)
Ní hé lá na báistí lá na bpáistí ach bíonn píosa spraoi ag na Blociontais agus na Trí Bhéar! (The Wonderblocks help The Three Bears get ready for some rainy-day fun!)
Tagann John chuig an zú inniu agus péire lapaí air! (John the zookeeper arrives at the zoo wearing flippers!)
Níl Zac go maith ag cluichí Pip and Posy. (Zac isn't very good at Pip and Posy's games.)
Athinsint ar scéal Labhraidh Loinseach. (A retelling of the story of Labhraidh Loinseach.)
Daltaí Ghaelscoil Áine i nDroim Chonrach a beidh ag cumadóireacht faoi na héin. (Music series for children presented by John Sharpson.)
Ardaíonn George agus Seán leo vaigín Bhríd le pacáiste a bhailiú. (George and Steve borrow Betsy's wagon to pick up a package.)
Samhlaíonn Sonaí an saol a bheidh aige ina dhíoltóir leabhar nuair a bheidh sé mór. (Sonaí imagines his life working in a bookshop when he grows up.)
Aimsíonn Zou ubh dineasáir agus tugann sé aire mhaith di. (On today's programme, Zou finds a dinosaur egg and he is determined to take care of it.)
Tá gach uile dhuine in Abra Dabra ag iarraidh cúnaimh ach níl DeeDee in ann cabhrú leo. (Everyone in Abra Dabra is need of some help but DeeDee can't help.)
Beidh Cian ag foghlaim faoi tharracóirí agus an tábhacht atá leo ar an bhfeirm. (Today, Cian will learn about tractors and just how important they are on the farm.)
Inniu feicfidh muid moncaí maisithe agus bulladóir nach féidir leis a bhéal a dhúnadh. (Today we'll see monkey manicures and a bulldog who just can't stop talking.)
An tAthair Fiontán Ó Monacháin a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín Tom Sheáinín an tseachtain seo. (Fiontán Ó Monacháin will be chatting to Máirtín Tom Sheáinín on this show.)
Cuireann Hal i leith Abe go raibh sé ag caimiléireacht ag an gcluiche pócair. (Hal accuses Abe of cheating at poker.)
Titeann Coach i ngrá le bean nár casadh riamh air. (Coach falls in love with a woman he has never seen before.)
Is iad John Brosnan, Dónal O'Connor agus Patrick O'Connor aíonna an chláir. (Traditional music series, this programme features John Brosnan, Dónal O'Connor and Patrick O'Connor.)
Tá neacht Jessica trína chéile go bhfuil a fiancé gafa ag póilíní maidir le dúnmharú. (Jessica's niece is horrified when her fiancé is arrested following a murder.)
Tugann trí fhoireann aghaidh ar a chéile chun an pota óir a bhuachan. Seó cluichí á chur i láthair ag Eibhlín Ní Chonghaile. (Gameshow in which 3 teams compete to win the jackpot.)
Is iad Anna Mullarkey agus Jack Warnock a thabharfaidh faoin dúshlán sa gclár seo. (This week, Anna Mullarkey and Jack Warnock rise to the challenge.)
Tugann Paul aghaidh ar chroílár Na Garbh Chriochan. (Paul travels into the heart of the Rough Bounds of Knoydart.)
Beidh scoth an cheoil tíre ar an gclár seo le James Quinn agus fear na Gaillimhe, Noel Noone. (This best of Irish Country music featuring James Quinn and Noel Noone.)
Tá áit faighte ag Rory i scoil mór le rá ach caithfidh Lorelia cúnamh a iarraidh ar a máthair chun na táillí teagaisc a íoc. (Rory gets accepted to a fancy prep school.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Cuireann Hal i leith Abe go raibh sé ag caimiléireacht ag an gcluiche pócair. (Hal accuses Abe of cheating at poker.)
Tar siar linn go dtí an bhliain 1550 go aimsir na dTúdarach i gCaisleán Shoird i mBaile Átha Cliath. (We are in the year 1550 in the Tudor Era in Dublin's Swords Castle.)
Is baile tuaithe i ndeisceart Chontae Dhoire é Sleacht Néill, suite i gceantar Chairn Tóchair. (Síle Nic Chonaonaigh visits the village of Slaughtneil in South County Derry.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Beidh ETSS Páirc Chaisleán Dhumhach Thrá ag tabhairt aghaidh ar Choláiste Mhuire Droichead Átha sa gclár seo. (Sandymount Park ETSS v Our Lady's College Drogheda.)

programmes.show_name: Sa Deireadh Thiar: Banc Taistil Chonamar
programmes.show_description: Ba lá stairiúil é an 16 Aibreán 2004 nuair a cuireadh deireadh le banc taistil Bhanc na hÉireann. (The 16th of April 2004 was an historical day in Conamara.)
Tá Natasha ag iarraidh go dtaobhódh chuile dhuine léi in aghaidh Cora. (Natasha wants everyone on board with her vendetta against Cora.)
Titeann Coach i ngrá le bean nár casadh riamh air. (Coach falls in love with a woman he has never seen before.)
Beidh amhrán bréa Gaeilge ó Chaitríona O'Sullivan le cloisteáil sa gclár seo. (This week's show will feature a lovely Irish song from Catriona O'Sullivan filmed in Kerry.)
Rogha amhrán ó shraith 17 de Ghlór Tíre. (Featuring The Sheerin Family, Cliona Hagan, Michael English, Mike Denver, Louise Morrissey & Robert Mizzell.)
Tá ábhar ceiliúradh ag Martin agus Vicki ó tharla go bhfuil Tansform le fáil sna siopaí anois. (Martin and Vicki celebrate as Tansform lands on shelves.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Tá Natasha ag iarraidh go dtaobhódh chuile dhuine léi in aghaidh Cora. (Natasha wants everyone on board with her vendetta against Cora.)
Tugtar léargas ar thionscal dorcha na seacláide sa gclár faisnéise seo. (A gripping documentary about the bitter side of chocolate production.)
Scéal Jennifer Poole a dúnmharaíodh i mBaile Átha Cliath in Aibreán 2021. (24 year old mother of two Jennifer Poole was murdered by her ex-boyfriend.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Is baile tuaithe i ndeisceart Chontae Dhoire é Sleacht Néill, suite i gceantar Chairn Tóchair. (Síle Nic Chonaonaigh visits the village of Slaughtneil in South County Derry.)
Beidh amhrán bréa Gaeilge ó Chaitríona O'Sullivan le cloisteáil sa gclár seo. (This week's show will feature a lovely Irish song from Catriona O'Sullivan filmed in Kerry.)
Beidh ETSS Páirc Chaisleán Dhumhach Thrá ag tabhairt aghaidh ar Choláiste Mhuire Droichead Átha sa gclár seo. (Sandymount Park ETSS v Our Lady's College Drogheda.)
Leanfaidh Cormac dá thuras i gceantar maorga Bheanna Boirche i gCo. an Dúin. (Cormac walks and explores the majestic Mourne Mountains of Co. Down.)

programmes.show_name: Sa Deireadh Thiar: Banc Taistil Chonamar
programmes.show_description: Ba lá stairiúil é an 16 Aibreán 2004 nuair a cuireadh deireadh le banc taistil Bhanc na hÉireann. (The 16th of April 2004 was an historical day in Conamara.)
Cainéal nuachta 24 uair an chloig na Fraince atá i France 24. (FRANCE 24 is France's 24 hour international news channel.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Is í Niamh Ní Chróinín a bheidh ag léamh scéal an lae inniu. (Today's story of the day is read by Niamh Ní Chróinín.)
Bíonn an-spraoi ag Cody agus a mhuintir agus iad ag dul i bhfolach ar a chéile sa mbaile. (Cody's family enjoys a day at home together as they play Peek-a-Boo.)
Dreapann Bóba an Béar suas an clog agus titeann sé anuas arís! (Boba the Bear runs up the clock and quickly falls down again!)
Tagann an dath Oráiste ar cuairt inniu. (Today, the colour Orange pays a visit.)
Cuireann Cory agus a chairde aithne ar Yípita Cartinez, cé nach labhraíonn siad an teanga chéanna. (Cory and his friends strike up a friendship with Yípita Cartinez.)
Tugann Babaí Trucail faoi scrúdú tiomána. (Baby Truck takes her first driving test.)
Ag foghlaim faoi chluichí a bheidh Elmo inniu. (Elmo is learning all about games today.)
Tá drochghiúmar ar Pip agus Posy ach tá plean ag Jamila chun ardú croí a thabhairt dóibh. (Pip and Posy are having a 'bad mood day'.)
Ní maith le Tib an geansaí nua a rinne Mamó Mhór Olobob dó. (Tib isn't fond of his new jumper from Great Granny Olobob.)
Déanann Romeo bábóga aicsin de Catboy agus de Gekko. (Romeo turns Owlette's Flossy Flash figure into a device that transforms the other PJ Masks into action toys!)
Tá a ghlór caillte ag Lachachrogall agus socraíonn Wussywat dul sa tóir air. (When Duckadile loses his squeak, Wussywat decides to find it.)
Tá eagla ar Shíofra faoin stoirm atá ar an mbealach. (A storm hits Birdwell Island.)
Faigheann na cairde amach nach gá a bheith mór le bheith láidir. Ní neart go cur le chéile mar a deir na seangáin. (Our friends learn that you don't have to be big to be strong.)
Tá Ginger agus na Piseanna-Rex óga ag iarraidh Abhacádón óg a thabhairt abhaile. (Ginger and the Pea-Rexes guide a lively baby Avocadodon back to its herd after it hatches.)
Téann Dot agus Mamó ar thuras in éineacht le breathnú ar an mórghealach. (Dot goes on a road trip with Nana to get the best view of the super moon.)
Tá lachain óga sa ngairdín ach níl mamaí in éineacht leo ar chor ar bith. (There are ducks in the garden and Ella looks for the their mother.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Tugann Lotta a cóta ar iasacht do Lola ach nach gcailleann Lola é! (Lola borrows Lotta's coat but ends up losing it!)
Goideann an Banphrionsa Petswiper torc óg agus caithfidh na Petronix é a thabhairt slán. (Princess Petswiper captures a baby warthog and the Petronix have to fly to its rescue.)
Goideann na Guanos cuid thábhachtach d'obair bhaile Lola. (The Guanos steal an important piece of Lola's homework.)
Ba mhaith le Angelo píosaí a chaitheamh sa teach leis féin. (Angelo wants to have time on his own in the house.)
Cuirtear an milleán ar Dhónall faoi bheith ag úsáid tháibléad an tí. (Dónall gets the blame for using the house tablet.)
Níl aon easpa cláracha do dhaoine óga ar Cúla4 - bí ag spraoi agus ag foghlaim in éineacht linn. (Younger audiences will be spoilt for choice with Cúla4 - watch, play and learn.)
Amhrán spraíúil faoi eitleáin bheaga a bheidh againn inniu. (A fun song about Little Airplanes.)
Cruthaíonn Seacht Déag ealaín don dánlann nua. (Seventeen has to quickly create art for a new gallery.)
Teach Spraoi a dhathóidh na Dathanna inniu. (Today, the Colours have fun as they Colour in a Playhouse.)
Tá Gabh ag iarraidh túr le patrún deas a thógáil do Bhuaf, ach beidh cúnamh Ealaí ag teastáil. (Go wants to build Toad a tower with a nice pattern, but they will need Arty's help.)
Tá Pompon agus a cara Rita ag fáil faoi réir do cheolchoirm Josie. (We'll follow Pompon and his friend Rita as they prepare for Josie's concert.)
Tá Seán ag dul ar phicnic agus tugann sé glasraí agus greannán leis. (Seán goes on a picnic and brings vegetables and a comic book with him.)
Ní bhíonn Zac in ann dul ag codladh agus é ag fanacht thar oíche ag teach cara leis. (Zac is excited about his first sleepover but struggles to get to sleep.)
Clár ealaíne ina ndéanann Máire Treasa ceardaíocht, ealaín, agus oragámaí lena cara Scú Scú Scuab. (An exciting art series where Máire Treasa does arts and crafts with Scú Scú.)
Caithfidh Dot aire a thabhairt do hamstar na ranga don deireadh seachtaine. (Dot is tasked with taking her class's pet hamster home for the weekend.)
Tá gaireas nua ag Dot agus na Rangeroo chun cabhair a thabhairt do dhaoine. (Dot and her friends are introduced to a new Rangeroo device.)
Samhlaíonn Isabelle a saol ina zó-eolaí nuair a bheidh sí mór, le cúnamh ó Shióg na bPost. (Isabelle imagines her life as a zoologist when she grows up.)
Rachaidh Zou agus Daideo sa tóir ar chadhc don lá deireanach de laethanta saoire an tsamhraidh. (Zou and Grandpa go in search of a kayak for the last day of the school holidays.)
Tá brioscaí Tiggy dóite agus caisleán cártaí Boris millte. An éireoidh DeeDee as a cuid draíochta? (Will DeeDee give up on magic for good?)
Beidh Síofra ag dul ar thuras báid go hÁrainn inniu. (Today, Síofra will go on a boat trip out to Árainn.)
Inniu ar an gclár beidh cat ag léamh, gadhar ag placadh agus géanna géimiúla, glórmhara. (Today we'll see cats with books, pups with sophisticated pallets and a gaggle of geese.)
Nuala Holloway as an Móta i gCo na hIarmhí ó dhúchas a bheidh ag comhrá le Máirtín ar an gclár seo. (Nuala Holloway from Moate in Co. Westmeath joins Máirtín in studio.)
Cuirtear i leith Reese go raibh sé ag goid ag an obair. (Reese is accused of stealing at his new job.)
Gnóthaíonn Irene an crannchur mór agus ní fada go mbíonn Coach caite sna fataí lofa aici. (After Irene wins the lottery, she dumps Coach, infuriating the rest of the gang.)
Beidh ceol ó Jimmy Doyle, Paudie Gleeson, Máire Ní Ghráda agus Nick Daly ar an gclár. (Traditional music from Kerry presented by Eibhlín de Paor and Breandán Ó Beaglaoich.)
Ní mó ná sásta atá Jessica go bhfuil scannán uafáis suarach déanta bunaithe ar a leabhar. (Jessica protests when her book is turned into a tacky B-grade horror movie.)
Beidh amhrán bréa Gaeilge ó Chaitríona O'Sullivan le cloisteáil sa gclár seo. (This week's show will feature a lovely Irish song from Catriona O'Sullivan filmed in Kerry.)
Beidh ETSS Páirc Chaisleán Dhumhach Thrá ag tabhairt aghaidh ar Choláiste Mhuire Droichead Átha sa gclár seo. (Sandymount Park ETSS v Our Lady's College Drogheda.)
Téann Paul ar thuras ó Lairg go Lochinver agus as sin go barr Suilven. (Paul embarks on a Grand Tour from Lairg to Lochinver and finally to the summit of Suilven.)
Beidh scoth an cheoil tíre ar an gclár seo le Patrick Feeney agus Brendan Keane. (This show features the best of Irish Country music featuring Patrick Feeney and Brendan Keane.)
T-léine, bríste gearr agus buataisí buachaillí bó a chaitheann Lorelai ag tabhairt Rory chuig a céad lá ar scoil. A shorts and cowboy boots clad Lorelai accompanies Rory on her first day at school.
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Cuirtear i leith Reese go raibh sé ag goid ag an obair. (Reese is accused of stealing at his new job.)
Foghlaim faoina marsúipiaigh a bhíonn chomh héagsúil óna chéile. (Learn about marsupials, who are at times so different from one another that it is surprising they are related.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Mórimeachtaí an lae ó Aonad Nuachta TG4. (The day's main news stories from a regional, national and international perspective.)
Craoladh beo ar an gcluiche idir an Clár agus Luimneach i gCraobh Iomána na Mumhan F20 Fulfill. (Live coverage of Clare v Limerick in the Fulfill U20 Munster Hurling Championship.)
Cuirfear deireadh leis an tsraith in oirdheisceart an Chláir ag Seó Bhaile an Droichid. (The series wraps in Southeast Clare at the Bridgetown Show.)
Leaneann an Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt lorg Annraoi Ó Liatháin fad na Siúire. (Dr. Colm Mac Gearailt continues in the footsteps of Annroai O' Liatháin along the River Suir.)
Bíonn sé ina aighneas idir Colby agus an t-iarphóilín Bob Stephenson. (Colby clashes with veteran cop Bob Stephenson, exposing his fading memory and shaking the case.)
Aimsir réigiúnach agus náisiúnta. (National and regional weather.)
Tá dúshláin fós le buachan agus Comhairlí Treibhe fós le teacht. (There are still immunity challenges to win and tribal councils to face.)
